title: Questions from Quarantine: Pandemic Family Management and Women Leaving the Workforce
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine. _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: The Security and Global Health Project hosts a weekly web series featuring Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux, addressing audience questions submitted via social media with the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine. The series provides guidance on managing personal and family well-being during the COVID-19 pandemic, focusing on practical advice for maintaining sanity and hygiene amid global crisis conditions. A specific episode highlighted the topic of pandemic family management and its disproportionate impact on women, linking to broader concerns about women leaving the workforce due to increased caregiving burdens. The article context includes related expert commentary on supply chain management, event safety planning, and public health issues like the H3N2 influenza variant, positioning the discussion within ongoing policy debates about pandemic response, gender equity, and workforce stability.
result.main_content_zh: 安全与全球健康项目每周举办网络系列节目，由安全专家朱丽叶·凯耶姆和医学专家玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持，通过社交媒体标签#QuestionsFromQuarantine收集并回答观众提问。该系列旨在为全球危机中的个人与家庭提供保持心理平衡与卫生的实用建议。其中一期特别关注疫情下的家庭管理及其对女性的不成比例影响，关联到因照料负担加重导致女性退出劳动力市场的广泛社会问题。文章背景还涉及供应链管理、大型活动安全规划等相关专家评论，以及H3N2流感变种等公共卫生议题，将讨论置于疫情应对、性别平等和劳动力市场稳定等持续政策辩论的框架之中。
